## [00:00 - 00:54]

In this lesson, I'm going to introduce you to my influencer marketing cheat sheet. This is important because in advanced e-commerce, we've assumed quite a lot of knowledge of the influencer marketing space as a whole. This cheat sheet is a really great top line overview that's going to give you a summary of campaign strategy, influencer discovery and collaboration. As an action item for this lesson, I want you to read through the entire influencer marketing cheat sheet, seeing where you can apply this back to your brand. Our worksheet for this lesson is going to take you step by step how exactly you can apply this to your brand. Go ahead, do that now and I'll pass you over to the next instructor.
